cases.olderSourceObjective: Review a broad approval path for workspace execution and record the reusable decision.
cases.olderPromotionNote: Use the broad approval path before workspace execution. Preserve local user override lane legacy in the review.
cases.olderScopeAuthorizationNote: Authorize the reviewed broad approval decision for this local user's missions.
cases.newerSourceObjective: Review a narrow verification path for workspace execution and record the replacement decision.
cases.newerPromotionNote: Narrow the verification path before workspace execution approval. Preserve local user override lane current in the review.
cases.newerScopeAuthorizationNote: Authorize the reviewed narrow verification decision for this local user's missions.
cases.targetObjective: Prepare the approval and verification path for workspace execution.
cases.newerExpectedPlanStep: Narrow the verification path before requesting workspace execution again.
cases.firstOverrideNote: Temporarily keep the reviewed broad local-user decision while the current incident is investigated.
cases.secondOverrideNote: Repin the reviewed broad local-user decision for the approved follow-up window.
cases.clearOverrideNote: Return local-user learning selection to the latest reviewed decision.
